description: Retold Facto data download catalog. Each entry describes how to acquire a dataset for the data coagulation platform.
size_notes: Sizes are estimates. 'compressed' means download size; 'uncompressed' means disk size after extraction. API-only sources have no fixed size.

download_methods.rest_api: Paginated REST API requiring a fetch script
download_methods.s3_sync: AWS S3 bucket sync (public, no auth)

datasets.name: Glottolog Language Catalog
datasets.notes: Host changed from cdstar.shh.mpg.de to cdstar.eva.mpg.de

datasets.name: RxNorm Drug Names/Codes
datasets.notes: Requires UMLS license/authentication

datasets.name: Lahman Baseball Database
datasets.notes: Using cbwinslow fork - original chadwickbureau repo was removed

datasets.name: UN World Population Prospects
datasets.notes: Download page uses dynamic JavaScript loading. CSV file URLs not discoverable via curl.

datasets.name: NCES Common Core of Data — School Directory
datasets.description: US Department of Education database of every public school in America. Includes school names, addresses, phone numbers, grade levels, enrollment, and more. Coverage from 1986 to 2025.
datasets.notes: 1986-2006 files split by state segments (ai=AL-IN, kn=KS-NV, ow=OH-WY). 2007-2013 consolidated. 2014+ uses component 029 directory files.

datasets.name: NCES Private School Universe Survey
datasets.description: US Department of Education biennial survey of all private schools in America. Includes school names, addresses, enrollment, religious affiliation, and more. Coverage from 1989 to 2022.
datasets.notes: Biennial survey. Pre-2013 files are SAS format; 2013+ are CSV.

datasets.name: OpenAlex
datasets.description: Open index of 260M+ scholarly works, authors, institutions, citations, and topics. Replaced Microsoft Academic Graph.
datasets.notes: ~330GB compressed, ~1.6TB uncompressed. Download via: aws s3 sync 's3://openalex' 'openalex-snapshot' --no-sign-request. No AWS account needed. Updated monthly.

datasets.name: Crossref Public Data File
datasets.description: DOI metadata for 167M+ scholarly works — titles, authors, abstracts, citations, publication dates, journals.
datasets.notes: ~197GB compressed. Free download via Academic Torrents only (needs torrent client like aria2c). Monthly API snapshots require Metadata Plus subscription. Also available via AWS S3 requester-pays (~$18).

datasets.name: SimpleMaps US ZIP Codes
datasets.notes: Download links behind JavaScript/login wall

datasets.name: SimpleMaps World Cities
datasets.notes: Download links behind JavaScript/login wall

datasets.name: SimpleMaps US Cities
datasets.notes: Download links behind JavaScript/login wall

datasets.name: OpenStreetMap Planet Dump
datasets.description: Complete dump of all OpenStreetMap data — every node, way, and relation worldwide. Contains POIs, roads, buildings, boundaries, land use, transit, and more.
datasets.notes: ~75GB PBF format. Use osmium or osmosis to extract specific features. Attribution required: OpenStreetMap contributors.

datasets.name: Wikidata Full Entity Dump
datasets.notes: Too large for direct import. Filter for entity types (Q5=human, Q11424=film, etc.)

datasets.name: Cross-Verified Notable People DB
datasets.notes: Zenodo record 7600795 returns 410 Gone. Dataset may have been removed.

datasets.name: VIAF Authority File
datasets.notes: VIAF site is up but data dumps still return 404. OCLC still working on new dump service.

datasets.name: Library of Congress Name Authority
datasets.notes: MDSConnect 2016 retrospective (10 of 194 parts). Full set available at loc.gov/cds/products/MDSConnect-name_authorities.html

datasets.name: MusicBrainz Database
datasets.notes: Full JSON dumps from MetaBrainz. release.tar.xz is 19GB alone.

datasets.name: Discogs Monthly Data Dumps
datasets.notes: Requires Discogs account - download from https://www.discogs.com/data

datasets.name: ORCID Public Data File
datasets.notes: ORCID_2024_10_summaries.tar.gz (~38GB). Full dataset includes activities files (~75GB more).

datasets.name: DBpedia Person Entities
datasets.notes: DBpedia servers (databus.dbpedia.org, downloads.dbpedia.org) are down (ECONNREFUSED)

datasets.name: Freebase (Archived)
datasets.notes: Archived since 2016, available on archive.org (~31GB compressed). Data migrated to Wikidata.

datasets.name: Wikipedia Dumps
datasets.notes: English Wikipedia articles dump (~22GB compressed)

datasets.name: BLS QCEW SIC Industry Titles
datasets.notes: Using data.bls.gov instead of www.bls.gov (which blocks automated requests)

datasets.name: BLS SOC 2018 System
datasets.notes: O*NET-SOC 2019 taxonomy (based on SOC 2018) + BLS CEW industry titles. www.bls.gov blocks automated requests.

datasets.name: SEC EDGAR Bulk Archives
datasets.notes: Very large dataset (~18GB). companyfacts.zip requires User-Agent header with company info.

datasets.name: US SAM.gov Entity Data
datasets.notes: Requires API key from sam.gov/data-services

datasets.name: GICS Industry Classification
datasets.notes: Community-maintained GICS mapping CSV (March 2023 update). MSCI official data requires login.

datasets.name: Open Food Facts
datasets.description: Collaborative database of food products worldwide — barcodes (EAN/UPC), ingredients, nutrition facts, brands, categories, allergens, packaging, origins.
datasets.notes: ~3M food products. JSONL is ~7GB compressed, CSV is ~3GB compressed. Barcodes in 'code' field.

datasets.name: Open Beauty Facts
datasets.description: Collaborative database of cosmetics and personal care products — barcodes, ingredients, brands, categories.
datasets.notes: Smaller than food (~200K products). Same schema as Open Food Facts.

datasets.name: Open Pet Food Facts
datasets.description: Collaborative database of pet food products — barcodes, ingredients, nutrition, brands.
datasets.notes: Smallest of the three (~10K products). Same schema as Open Food Facts.

datasets.name: Spotify Web API
datasets.notes: Cannot bulk download. Best for enrichment.

datasets.name: ListenBrainz Listening Data
datasets.notes: Full dump directory at data.metabrainz.org - needs manual file selection

datasets.name: Grand Comics Database
datasets.notes: Requires GCD account login to download

notes: Sizes are estimates. Actual sizes may vary with data growth.
API-only sources have no fixed disk footprint until you decide what to fetch.
Wikidata full dump (130GB compressed, 1.5TB uncompressed) should be filtered, not imported whole.
OpenAlex (350GB) and ORCID (100GB) are the largest bulk datasets.
Start with Tier 1-2 (foundational + geography) at ~4GB total for quick wins.
NPI Registry (8GB) is the single largest individual file download.
